allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1 'استخدم flutter_staggered_grid_view: ^0.7.0 عشان تعمل الgridview اللى فى الابليكيشن كله بطريقة Pinterest' -Json -ShortName 'pinterest-staggered-grid' 'Pinterest-Style Staggered Grid'")

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" -Json -ShortName "pinterest-staggered-grid" "Pinterest-style staggered grid layout across the entire application")

Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" -Json -ShortName "pinterest-staggered-grid" -FeatureDescription "Pinterest-style staggered grid layout across the entire application")
